---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a gameplay or UX improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement
What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change
Describe the requested behavior.

## Acceptance criteria
List concrete, testable outcomes:
- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Affected areas
- [ ] UI components/pages (`src/features/*`, `src/ui/*`)
- [ ] Sudoku logic (`src/domain/sudoku/*`)
- [ ] State/persistence (`src/state/*`, `src/persistence/*`)
- [ ] Worker contracts/implementation (`src/workers/*`)
- [ ] Docs/spec updates

## Non-goals
What should explicitly stay out of scope?

## Testing expectations
Which layers should cover this?
- [ ] Component/unit
- [ ] Integration
- [ ] E2E (for cross-page or critical user flow)

## Additional context
Mockups, references, edge cases, or constraints.
